title: Hypertension annual review

examination.text: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.
examination.rationale: Severe blood-pressure and same-day-review features were reviewed as prompts only; the generic red-flag items were not treated as conclusions.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.5.1-1.5.3 - severe hypertension and same-day specialist review features

medication.text: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.
medication.rationale: The NICE section explicitly supports annual review of blood pressure, lifestyle, symptoms, medicines, home monitoring, postural symptoms, patient support, and clinician-led follow-up without generating treatment.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

follow_up.text: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular-risk discussion and review of urine, blood, retinal, and ECG assessments where actually performed or already ordered.
follow_up.rationale: The NICE risk and target-organ section supports reviewing already performed urine, blood, retinal, and ECG assessments when relevant; it does not order them automatically.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular-risk discussion and review of urine, blood, retinal, and ECG assessments where actually performed or already ordered.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.3.1-1.3.3 - cardiovascular risk and target-organ assessment

source_limitations: Diagnosis, home and clinic readings, postural measurements, symptoms, medicines and doses, adherence, adverse effects, lifestyle discussion, kidney and metabolic tests, urine, retinal examination, ECG, cardiovascular risk, target, treatment, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
